name: checked
description: Controls the checked state. Using this makes the checkbox a controlled component.

name: defaultChecked
description: Sets the initial checked state. Use for uncontrolled usage.

name: onCheckedChange
description: Callback invoked when the checked state changes.

name: intent
description: Controls the color intent of the checkbox.

name: label
description: Label text displayed next to the checkbox. Clicking the label toggles the checkbox.

name: required
description: Marks the field as required for form validation.
